62.name: Arcane
62.description:
Manipulates raw Arcane magic, destroying enemies with overwhelming power.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

63.name: Fire
63.description:
Focuses the pure essence of Fire magic, assaulting enemies with combustive flames.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

64.name: Frost
64.description:
Freezes enemies in their tracks and shatters them with Frost magic.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

65.name: Holy
65.description:
Invokes the power of the Light to heal and protect allies and vanquish evil from the darkest corners of the world.

Preferred Weapon: Sword, Mace, and Shield

66.name: Protection
66.description:
Uses Holy magic to shield themselves and defend allies from attackers.

Preferred Weapon: Sword, Mace, Axe, and Shield

70.name: Retribution
70.description:
A righteous crusader who judges and punishes opponents with weapons and Holy magic.

Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Sword, Mace, Axe

71.name: Arms
71.description:
A battle-hardened master of weapons, using mobility and overpowering attacks to strike their opponents down.

Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

72.name: Fury
72.description:
A furious dual-wielding berserker unleashing a flurry of attacks to carve their opponents to pieces.

Preferred Weapons: Dual Two-Handed Axes, Maces, Swords

73.name: Protection
73.description:
A stalwart protector who uses a shield to safeguard themselves and their allies.

Preferred Weapon: Axe, Mace, Sword, and Shield

102.name: Balance
102.description:
Can shapeshift into a powerful Moonkin, balancing the power of Arcane and Nature magic to destroy enemies.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Dagger, Mace

103.name: Feral
103.description:
Takes on the form of a great cat to deal damage with bleeds and bites.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

104.name: Guardian
104.description:
Takes on the form of a mighty bear to absorb damage and protect allies.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

105.name: Restoration
105.description:
Channels powerful Nature magic to regenerate and revitalize allies.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Dagger, Mace

250.name: Blood
250.description:
A dark guardian who manipulates and corrupts life energy to sustain themselves in the face of an enemy onslaught.

Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

251.name: Frost
251.description:
An icy harbinger of doom, channeling runic power and delivering vicious weapon strikes.

Preferred Weapons: Dual Axes, Maces, Swords

252.name: Unholy
252.description:
A master of death and decay, spreading infection and controlling undead minions to do their bidding.

Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

253.name: Beast Mastery
253.description:
A master of the wild who can tame a wide variety of beasts to assist them in combat.

Preferred Weapon: Bow, Crossbow, Gun

254.name: Marksmanship
254.description:
A master sharpshooter who excels in bringing down enemies from afar.

Preferred Weapon: Bow, Crossbow, Gun

255.name: Survival
255.description:
An adaptive ranger who favors using explosives, animal venom, and coordinated attacks with their bonded beast.

Preferred Weapon: Polearm, Staff

256.name: Discipline
256.description:
Shields allies from harm and cures their wounds by smiting enemies.
Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

257.name: Holy
257.description:
A versatile healer who can reverse damage on individuals or groups and even heal from beyond the grave.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

258.name: Shadow
258.description:
Uses sinister Shadow magic and terrifying Void magic to eradicate enemies.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

259.name: Assassination
259.description:
A deadly master of poisons who dispatches victims with vicious dagger strikes.

Preferred Weapons: Daggers

260.name: Outlaw
260.description:
A ruthless fugitive who uses agility and guile to stand toe-to-toe with enemies.

Preferred Weapons: Axes, Maces, Swords, Fist Weapons

261.name: Subtlety
261.description:
A dark stalker who leaps from the shadows to ambush their unsuspecting prey.

Preferred Weapons: Daggers

262.name: Elemental
262.description:
A spellcaster who harnesses the destructive forces of nature and the elements.

Preferred Weapon: Mace, Dagger, and Shield

263.name: Enhancement
263.description:
A totemic warrior who strikes foes with weapons imbued with elemental power.

Preferred Weapons: Dual Axes, Maces, Fist Weapons

264.name: Restoration
264.description:
A healer who calls upon ancestral spirits and the cleansing power of water to mend allies' wounds.

Preferred Weapon: Mace, Dagger, and Shield

265.name: Affliction
265.description:
A master of shadow magic who specializes in drains and damage-over-time spells.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

266.name: Demonology
266.description:
A commander of demons who twists the souls of their army into devastating power.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

267.name: Destruction
267.description:
A master of chaos who calls down fire to burn and demolish enemies.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

268.name: Brewmaster
268.description:
A sturdy brawler who uses unpredictable movement and mystical brews to avoid damage and protect allies.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

269.name: Windwalker
269.description:
A martial artist without peer who pummels foes with hands and fists.

Preferred Weapons: Fist Weapons, Axes, Maces, Swords

270.name: Mistweaver
270.description:
A healer who masters the mysterious art of manipulating life energies aided by the wisdom of the Jade Serpent.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Mace, Sword

577.name: Havoc
577.description:
A brooding master of warglaives and the destructive power of Fel magic.

Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons

581.name: Vengeance
581.description:
Embraces the demon within to incinerate enemies and protect their allies.

Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons

1467.name: Devastation
1467.description:
Releases innate power as chaotic Red flames or focused Blue magic to bathe the battlefield in destruction.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

1468.name: Preservation
1468.description:
Calls upon the Emerald Dream to rejuvenate life, and the Bronze sands of time to prevent harm.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

1473.name: Augmentation
1473.description:
Imbues allies with the might of the Black dragons, and bends time & fate in their favor with Bronze magic.

Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace
